name: Fluffy Light Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Finely chopped green pepper or celery
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine all loaf ingredients in your hands.
3. Form the mixture into a loaf and place it in a 9 X 5 X 3-inch loaf pan, covered with a layer of chili sauce (or ketchup if desired).
4. Bake for 50 minutes to 1 hour. Do not overbake, as part of the secret to fluffiness is shorter cooking time.
5. Serve the meat loaf sliced and hot. Serves 4.
6. Variation: For a lower-calorie option, use half ground veal and half ground beef in the recipe.
